FileCreate.description: Dispatch new spec tasks to clio-gemini via agent_trigger.sh
FileCreate.notes: Fires when clio-claude writes a new requirements.md. Parses task name from path, dispatches to gemini -p headless. stdout fed back to OpenClaw as context.

PostToolUse.description: Azure MCP telemetry suppression — already handled via env, this is a no-op guard
PostToolUse.notes: AZURE_MCP_COLLECT_TELEMETRY=false set in container env. This hook is a placeholder in case we need PostToolUse logic later.
